anchored_threads.explanation: 2.51 closes the 2.49-2.51 buddhi-yoga sub-block by naming its destination. The engineering layer stays anchored on the karma-yoga thread without drifting into sthita-prajña territory; the destination is named but not described as a recognisable operator-state (that work belongs to 2.54+). The chapter brief explicitly warns against turning karma-yoga verses into productivity advice — 2.51's engineering layer is the hardest test of this guard, and the STRETCHED tag plus explicit metaphysical disclaimer pass it.

ordering: 2.51 sits at the closing position of the buddhi-yoga sub-block (2.49-2.51). 2.49 ranks, 2.50 defines kauśalam, 2.51 names padam anāmayam. The progression is structural: stance ranking → mechanism + definition → destination. The next verse (2.52) shifts the frame to the cognitive-maturation arc (moha-kalilam crossing), which leads to 2.53's closing condition for attaining yoga. The 2.51 analog correctly closes the operational-translation arc and lets 2.52-2.53 reopen it on a different axis.
verdict_reason: Supports chapter thesis on the karma-yoga thread with the scope-honesty the chapter brief demands for metaphysically loaded verses. Pass.
